event: message_start
data: {"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"msg_sc","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-5","content":[],"stop_reason":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":20,"output_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":30,"cache_read_input_tokens":50}}}

event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":"Hi"}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}

event: message_delta
data: {"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"end_turn"},"usage":{"output_tokens":5}}

event: message_stop
data: {"type":"message_stop"}
